## How verified

- [ ] `COVERAGE=1 bundle exec rspec` green at 100% line coverage
- [ ] `bundle exec rubocop` clean
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (user-visible changes)

## Checklist for payroll/statutory changes

- [ ] New date-keyed rate-card entry (existing cards untouched)
- [ ] Source link for the statutory figure(s) included below
- [ ] Table-driven specs cover the new boundaries
